extraction.one_line_summary: UL Hugo won from 28-rider breakaway while POGACAR attacked Port de Lers and descent but VINGEGAARD matched everything with CUSS domestique support.
tactical_patterns: POGACAR attacked Port de Lers climb then continued pressure on descent, revealing willingness to spend domestiques early in stage.
JUMBO deployed CUSS as super-domestique after MICHAEL mechanical, showing depth to cover THOMAS distancing without VINGEGAARD committing.
ISRAEL PREMIER TECH placed two riders in 28-man break, enabling JORGENSEN to sacrifice chase for UL's victory.
MARTINEZ from breakaway dropped back to pace THOMAS, showing INEOS using morning break riders as insurance policy.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: attacked Port de Lers climb and descent 60km from finish but gained zero time, burning matches prematurely
rider_signals.CUSS Sepp: positive: stepped up as lead domestique after MICHAEL mechanical, paced over final climb showing elite domestique form
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: required MARTINEZ assistance from breakaway to rejoin yellow group, indicating vulnerability with 2 Pyrenean stages remaining
rider_signals.JORGENSEN Matteo: negative: crashed on final descent while chasing UL, lost podium after being best chaser on climb
rider_signals.UL Hugo: positive: soloed 27km descent with 20-second gap, first road victory showing descending confidence under pressure
